creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #10)
> pam_xdg sets XDG_RUNTIME_DIR to /var/run/user/<username>

Base pam_xdg sets /var/run/**xdg**/<username>

> I still believe that it should've gone into Ports first

sysutils/pam_xdg exists since 2021-05-04 and sets /var/run/user/<uid> like sysutils/consolekit2. However, the implementation is different from /usr/lib/pam_xdg.so
